creator: mtm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I tried what you suggest and it works as expected for me on -CURRENT (I
don't have a 6.2 system handy to test on). Can you please re-confirm that
this problem does still exist, and if so can you send me a copy of your
/etc/rc.conf and any other local conf files (with sensitive info removed),
and the output of:
 # rcorder -s nostart /etc/rc.d/* /usr/local/etc/rc.d/* /usr/X11R6/etc/rc.d/*
Also, are there any modifications to the stock rc.d or etc files?

Thanks.
-- 
Mike Makonnen          | GPG-KEY: http://people.freebsd.org/~mtm/mtm.asc
mmakonnen_at_gmail.com | AC7B 5672 2D11 F4D0 EBF8  5279 5359 2B82 7CD4 1F55
mtm_at_FreeBSD.Org     | FreeBSD - http://www.freebsd.org
